title: Evaluation Run Status
description: Written to output/eval_status.json throughout a run. External CLI polls this file.

run_id.description: Timestamp-based identifier for this run, e.g. 20250526_143022

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last status update

pipeline.description: Pipeline YAML filename used for this run

agent_endpoint.description: Agent endpoint URL that was evaluated

error.description: Error message if status is 'failed', otherwise null
